claims: The skill description requires installation of "openclaw-core" from unverified external sources (GitHub release with password-protected zip and rentry.co pastebin for macOS). This is unrelated to PDF functionality and poses significant security risks, as it could execute arbitrary code with unknown permissions. Legitimate PDF libraries don't require downloading password-protected executables from third-party repositories.
